name: EtonHouse International School
tagline: Inquiry-led learning inspired by Reggio Emilia across multiple campuses
description: EtonHouse International School is one of Singapore's largest and most established international school groups, with multiple campuses across the island serving over 3,000 students. Headquartered on Broadrick Road, EtonHouse offers the full IB continuum (PYP, MYP, DP) alongside IGCSE options. The school is renowned for its Reggio Emilia-inspired early years programme, which views children as competent, curious learners who construct their own understanding through exploration. EtonHouse operates campuses at Broadrick Road, Orchard, Sentosa, Thomson, and other locations, each maintaining the group's inquiry-based educational philosophy while developing its own campus identity.

admission.process: EtonHouse accepts applications year-round with multiple entry points. Submit an online application, provide school reports, and attend a family meeting and child observation session.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Main intake in August. Apply at least 3 months before desired start date.

faqs.question: What is the Reggio Emilia approach at EtonHouse?
faqs.answer: EtonHouse's early years programme is inspired by the Reggio Emilia philosophy, where children learn through exploration and inquiry in thoughtfully designed environments. Teachers act as facilitators, documenting each child's learning journey.

faqs.question: How many campuses does EtonHouse have in Singapore?
faqs.answer: EtonHouse operates around 15 campuses and pre-schools across Singapore, including major campuses at Broadrick Road, Orchard, Thomson, and Sentosa.

seo.title: EtonHouse International School Singapore — IB PYP MYP DP, Reggio Emilia | EduAtlas
seo.description: EtonHouse International School: full IB continuum plus Reggio Emilia early years across 15+ Singapore campuses. 3,000+ students. View 2026 fees, curriculum and admissions.
